PERCEPTION: You keep looking over your shoulder. What did you really see out there?
I notice your hands are shaking. This is more than a rumor to you.
Your eyes keep drifting toward the treeline. What are you watching for?
INSIGHT: You're choosing your words carefully. What aren't you telling me?
There's something you're leaving out. I can tell.
The way you told that story... you left out the important part, didn't you?
INVESTIGATION: The details don't add up. What's the real story here?
You skipped over something. Walk me through it again, slowly.
There's a piece missing from what you just told me. Think harder.
